overall.description: A nighttime drive along an elevated highway in a futuristic cyberpunk city during heavy rain. The scene features neon-lit skyscrapers marked '06' and '07', industrial structures with red warning lights, and wet reflective roads characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated cyberpunk highway with neon-lit skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: driving forward along the elevated highway through heavy rain, approaching the illuminated skyscrapers

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with large illuminated '06' signage near the top, red and white lighting
tall skyscraper with illuminated '07' signage, glass facade with vertical lighting
multi-lane elevated roadway stretching into the distance with wet reflective surface
large illuminated advertising screen displaying colorful graphics
metal safety barrier along the left edge of the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night drive along an elevated highway in a futuristic city. Two massive skyscrapers marked '06' and '07' dominate the skyline ahead, their facades glowing with neon light. The wet road surface reflects the city lights as the vehicle moves forward through the hazy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial highway curve with warning light systems

events.description: large red triangular warning signs with exclamation marks become visible along the right side of the highway
view opens to reveal industrial yard and ground level streets below the elevated highway

agents.ego_description: navigating a rightward curve along the elevated highway, passing red warning signage

notable_agents.action: distant vehicle traveling on the highway ahead with headlights visible

entered.detail: large illuminated red triangular warning sign with white exclamation mark symbol
series of red LED arrow lights embedded in the highway edge indicating curve direction
tall industrial structures with red aviation warning lights on top

segments.scene_description: The highway curves right through an industrial district, with prominent red warning triangles and chevron lights guiding the path. Building 07 recedes from view while the camera passes under highway overpasses. The perspective shifts to reveal the industrial yard and streets far below the elevated roadway.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial warehouse district with ground level traffic visible below

events.description: ground vehicles visible on the street level below, headlights illuminating the wet industrial yard

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated highway with view overlooking the industrial ground level

entered.detail: ground level industrial complex with warehouses, containers, and parked vehicles
cars and trucks moving on the street level far below the elevated highway
low-rise industrial buildings with flat roofs and minimal lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a sprawling industrial yard below the highway, with warehouse buildings and ground-level traffic visible through the rain. The red warning lights that were on the right now appear on the left as the highway straightens. The camera continues past the industrial complex with building 06 now receding into the distance behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a rainy elevated highway that transitions from a neon-lit skyline into a sprawling industrial district. It begins with a forward movement toward two massive skyscrapers marked 06 and 07, their glowing facades reflecting off the wet road surface through a hazy atmosphere. As the highway curves right, the camera passes under overpasses and moves away from building 07, guided by prominent red warning triangles and chevron lights. The perspective then shifts to reveal an industrial yard and ground-level traffic far below the roadway, with the red warning lights shifting from the right to the left as the path straightens. Finally, the camera continues past the warehouse complex while building 06 recedes into the distance behind.
